problem_text_cn: A 船以速度 $v_A=30$ 千米/小时向东航行，B 船以速度 $v_B=45$ 千米/小时向北航行。求 A 船上的人观察到的 B 船的航速和航向。
problem_text_en: Ship A sails east at a speed of $v_A=30 \, \text{km/h}$, and ship B sails north at a speed of $v_B=45 \, \text{km/h}$. Find the speed and direction of ship B as observed by a person on ship A.
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】这里可用坐标系下的矢量办法求解。建立 $oxy$ 坐标，$x$ 轴正向指向东，$y$ 轴正向指向北。则 A、B 两船的速度分别记为
$$
v_A = v_A \boldsymbol{i}, \quad v_B = v_B \boldsymbol{j}
$$
其中 $\boldsymbol{i}$、$\boldsymbol{j}$ 分别为 $x$ 轴、$y$ 轴上的单位矢量。所求 A 船上的人观察到的 B 船的航速和航向，即为 B 船相对 A 船的速度：
$$
v_{BA} = v_B - v_A = 45 \boldsymbol{j} - 30 \boldsymbol{i} \quad \text{（千米/小时）}
$$
所以 A 船上看到 B 船的航速 $v_{BA}$ 为
$$
v_{BA} = \sqrt{45^2 + 30^2} = 54 \quad \text{（千米/小时）}
$$
航向为北偏西 $\theta$ 角：
$$
\theta = \arctan\frac{2}{3} \approx 33.7^\circ
$$
problem_solution_en:
【Analysis and Solution】This problem can be solved using vector methods in a coordinate system. Establish an $oxy$ coordinate system with the $x$-axis pointing east and the $y$-axis pointing north. The velocities of ships A and B are:
$$
v_A = v_A \boldsymbol{i}, \quad v_B = v_B \boldsymbol{j}
$$
where $\boldsymbol{i}$ and $\boldsymbol{j}$ are unit vectors along the $x$- and $y$-axes, respectively. The velocity of ship B relative to ship A (as observed by a person on A) is:
$$
v_{BA} = v_B - v_A = 45 \boldsymbol{j} - 30 \boldsymbol{i} \quad \text{（km/h）}
$$
The speed of B relative to A is:
$$
v_{BA} = \sqrt{45^2 + 30^2} = 54 \quad \text{（km/h）}
$$
The direction is north-west by an angle $\theta$:
$$
\theta = \arctan\frac{2}{3} \approx 33.7^\circ
$$
img_cn: 两船航行方向与速度矢量示意图。
img_en: Schematic of the sailing directions and velocity vectors of the two ships.
problem_answer:
1) A 船上观察到 B 船的航速为 $54 \, \text{千米/小时}$；
2) 航向为北偏西约 $33.7^\circ$。
